configurePresets.name: vcpkg
configurePresets.description: Toolchain base: the bundled vcpkg submodule. compile_commands.json is exported wherever the generator supports it.

configurePresets.name: vcpkg-global
configurePresets.description: Toolchain base: a system-wide vcpkg via $VCPKG_ROOT.

configurePresets.name: ccache
configurePresets.description: Opt-in compiler cache mixin. Not baked into the shared presets because ccache isn't guaranteed on every machine (and MSVC needs extra setup). Enable it from your machine-local CMakeUserPresets.json — see CMakeUserPresets.json.example.

configurePresets.name: ninja
configurePresets.description: The default family on every desktop platform: configure once, then build any config via the debug/release build presets from the same tree. On Windows this drives MSVC — run from a 'x64 Native Tools for VS 2022' prompt, or let VS Code's CMake Tools supply the kit. Historical note: ASan (-fsanitize=address) was removed from the old dev preset — it deadlocks on macOS 26.1+ (Xcode 26.1+); re-add locally when Apple fixes the ASan/dyld interaction bug.

configurePresets.name: vs
configurePresets.description: The Windows IDE family: produces Atmospheric.sln in build-vs/ — open it in Visual Studio and F5 to build + debug (native debugger, profiler, natvis). Locates MSVC itself, so no developer prompt is needed. Separate binary dir from the ninja family — CMake refuses to reuse a build tree across generators.
